HRM, TRM, and our VARC are trained from scratch only on ARC data.
Our single-model result is based on ViT, with mean±std of 54.5±0.7 (ARC-1) and 8.3±0.4 (ARC-2) over four runs.
Our ensemble result aggregates an 18M ViT and a 55M U-Net, each with test-time training performed four times.
